title: helichrysum melaleucum subsp. roseum
intro: Helichrysum melaleucum subsp. roseum, also known as the Roseum Everlasting, is a perennial herb plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is native to Australia and is highly valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant activities. The Roseum Everlasting is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. This plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
